governance: Do not peek and stop merely when a desired result appears.
Do not switch the primary metric after observing results without marking the analysis exploratory.
Statistical significance does not guarantee practical value, durability, or acceptable guardrails.
When randomization is infeasible, label observational or staged-rollout conclusions appropriately.
